misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, is known for his tenacity and, shall we say, colorful language on the course. Representing Hirsala Golf, Simo has been a constant presence in this competition over the years. His adoption of a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season speaks to his dedication to improving his game and seeking every possible advantage.

With 10 past appearances, Simo's experience is undeniable. His three victories at the Hector Trophée demonstrate his ability to perform under pressure and his knack for excelling in the pairs format. Although the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, he remains a formidable competitor. As Simo prepares for Hector Trophée 2026, marking his 11th appearance, anticipation is high to see if he can add another title to his already impressive record.
